title: WePOP
subtitle: Global Audition Show
paragraph1: WePOP is a $1 million dollar singing competition to find the next global superstar. This concept of WebPOP is a no-brainer for a community project to effectively leverage the technologies of Web3, AI and social media. A clear exciting fit, It works on many different levels while keeping it fun for the Nasun community to manage, building off of a market proven model to create an amazing, interactive Web3 experience for a young global audience already familiar and comfortable with all this technology.
paragraph2: The Nasun community, those who have bought and hold a Founder's Black Series Frontiers NFT, will organize and produce WePOP to build excitement and suspense over a season of shows. The world will watch riveted to not only find out themselves the best, undiscovered singers but to vote themselves and decide the fates of the contestants and ultimately who will win the final $1million dollar prize and become the next global superstar.
paragraph3: Between each show where the contestants get narrowed down, we can organize secondary, more accessible content with the singers to grab the interest of the core WePOP community and help scale it up. We can also figure out how to market WePOP using both traditional models and trailblazing new ones using AI and social media. We can do ad buys on different platforms while also organizing campaigns on social media where the WePOP community can create content in support of their favorite singers.
paragraph4: There are several challenges WePOP can face and we will outline a few we believe are the most prominent below. One is whether to have ‘judges.’ Even though the global audience will vote for their favorite singers each show using the Nasun network, we would need to figure out whether to have personalities who give their professional opinions on the contestants after they have their turn singing. To give the audience familiar faces who have insightful, professional commentary could be necessary especially as they can be the avatars of how the audience might emotionally react to a performance. Or we can go with a more modern, young vibe whether there are not traditional host or judges and we use stuff like livestreams, group discussions and clips/memes to generate a new kind of viewing experience.
paragraph5: Another challenge is whether to use copyrighted songs or to use only original work produced by the contestants or by AI. This will be fascinating to figure out as these laws are not only changing but many are not even formed to deal with these new technologies and how they impact intellectual and creative properties. We believe with the community working together we will come up with great solutions that benefit the project and help turn it into a success.
paragraph6: With WePOP, we can generate a ton of content that will not only benefit Nasun by making the project financially sustainable, but also bring mass adoption and global awareness to the project. Our aim with WePOP is to create an entertaining experience that becomes a global phenomenon we as a community have fun building together.
